description_long: This house features a long, rectangular footprint with a modern architectural style, characterized by clean lines and a flat, overhanging roof in a deep brown color. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a covered porch and a series of large, evenly spaced windows, providing ample natural light. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light gray and white, with bold, diagonal accent elements adding visual interest. The rear and side elevations are more subdued, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The house sits on a green lawn, suggesting a suburban or urban neighborhood setting. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, rectangular house with a flat brown roof, large front windows, and bold diagonal accents on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, and large windows with diagonal accent elements.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long brown roof and the green lawn extending alongside the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and a focus on privacy, featuring the same diagonal wall accents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the end of the house, the flat roof, and the continuation of the green lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with a prominent main door, steps leading up, and large windows flanking the entry.
